forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 61, with temperatures falling to around 59 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

weather_report:
As the clock approaches the early hours, a gentle blanket of clouds enfolds Downtown San Francisco, holding the promise of a temperate night. The air feels soft, cradling the city in a mild embrace, with temperatures resting around the low fiftys. The familiar whisper of the southwest wind at nine miles per hour adds a delicate touch, invigorating yet soothing—a reminder that even in the cooler hours, the city pulses with life.

As dawn breaks, a mix of clouds and sun will grace the Sunday sky, ushering in a day marked by promise. Though the high might flirt with the low sixties, expect a touch of coolness to linger in the afternoon as temperatures glide to the upper fiftys. Windy moments will swirl about with gusts reaching 18 miles per hour, nudging you towards a light jacket or sweater to enjoy the day comfortably. 

The marine layer, a quintessential feature of our coastal fabric, hints at itself today, a fleeting appearance to soften the skyline while the sun makes its attempts to break through. It feels as though the city balances between the crispness of the ocean breeze and the warmth of the sun, setting a perfect stage for simple delights—perhaps a leisurely stroll along the Embarcadero, taking in the soft lapping of the Bay against the piers, or a quiet coffee at a tucked-away café, where you can watch the world cycle through its gentle rhythm. Perhaps a visit to a local park as where you nestle in, wrapped in the comforting layers of your choice, savoring the essence of this captivating city that beckons to be explored in all its understated splendor.
